description: Conduct an aviation SMS change-management safety assessment (ICAO Annex 19 management of change): describe the change, identify new and changed hazards, assess risk on the ICAO 5x5 Risk Classification Scheme (the shared A7 risk_matrix engine), mitigate through the hierarchy of controls, and approve or decline with a recorded rationale. Use this skill to assess the safety of a change for a named operator, airport, or AMO. Grounds in KB-STD-ICAO-ANNEX19 + KB-DATA-AVI-RISK-MATRIX, scores risk reproducibly via risk_matrix.score(), HoC-ranks mitigations (flagging PPE/admin-only), and validates owners/dates with smart_actions. Decision-support only; a competent person must review the output.
name: aviation-change-safety-assessment
